solutions.title: LRU Cache
solutions.content:
Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.

Implement the LRUCache class with get and put in average O(1) time.
solutions.approach: Use a hashmap to locate nodes in constant time and a doubly linked list to maintain usage order. On every get or update, move the node to the front. When capacity is exceeded, remove the tail node and erase it from the map.
solutions.complexity: Time: O(1) for get and put. Space: O(capacity).
